channel.title: flove making-of — direction questions
channel.description: New direction design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: What is the nety 'super' tier for?
item.description:
• Network powers — Super = pooled network stewardship. Direct donations, promote/demote content, govern pools, host/vouch others. Think: civic infrastructure. • Self-sovereignty — Super = run your own full node, host others, independent of the network. Think: personal infrastructure. • Hybrid — Both directions coexist — different features at different sub-tiers of super.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Hybrid

item.title: Should vizy recover its XR/VR direction?
item.description:
• Recover from git — Restore the old VR code, update it, and continue the XR/VR direction. • Abandon VR — Drop XR/VR entirely — focus vizy on web-based visualization. Simpler, lower risk. • Defer again — Don't decide now — revisit when vizy's core is stable.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Abandon VR
